description_long: This is an ornate, metallic kettle with a tall cylindrical body and a domed lid topped by a spherical knob. The surface is richly decorated with intricate engraved floral and geometric patterns, giving it a traditional, antique appearance. A prominent, arched handle is attached to one side, while a short, stout spout extends from the opposite side for pouring. The base is wide, raised, and circular, providing stability and further adorned with matching decorative motifs. The lid appears to be removable and fits snugly atop the vessel. The overall finish is glossy, with a dark brass or bronze coloration and reflective highlights.
description: Ornate metallic kettle with engraved patterns, domed lid, arched handle, and a short spout. Features a wide, decorated base and a glossy, antique finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched handle on the left, short spout on the right, and detailed engravings on the body and base.
description_view_1: Side view with the handle hidden, spout not visible, and the decorative patterns fully displayed on the cylindrical body.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the handle on the right, spout on the left, and the same ornate engravings visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the handle centered, no spout visible, and the engraved patterns wrapping around the body.
attribute_lid_design: domed removable lid with spherical knob
